title: scandix australis subsp. microcarpa
intro: Scandix australis subsp. microcarpa is a subspecies of the Australian scurvy grass, a plant species known for its medicinal properties. It is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and fighting off infections. It can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for those seeking alternative treatments.
